rationale: The cited paper appears only as a single supporting reference in the limitations/future research section, where the authors note that preference fluency is negatively related to choice deferral. It is not used to build the main hypotheses, motivate the core theoretical framework, or guide the experimental design and analyses in the serotonin depletion studies. The citation functions as background context for a suggested future mediator rather than as an active foundation of the reported contribution.
